records.summary: A listing page for two upcoming yoga retreats near Berlin: 'Be the Leaf' (March 2026) and 'Where We Bloom' (April/May 2025), each led by different instructors at separate venues in the Brandenburg region.
records.retreatName: Multiple retreats: 'Be the Leaf' and 'Where We Bloom'
records.where: Haven Havelland (90 min from Berlin) / Haus Erlengrund, Buckow (Märkische Schweiz)
records.when: March 12–15, 2026 / April 30 – May 3 (year not explicitly stated, likely 2025)
records.price: Not shown on page; 'Where We Bloom' links to external page for pricing; 'Be the Leaf' price not visible
includes: Details require clicking through to separate pages or external sites
records.notes: This is a mixed listing page with two different retreats, prices are hidden or offsite, no daily schedule or inclusions are shown, and the page URL ('academy-1') gives no SEO signal for yoga retreats — a visitor cannot answer all five key questions without leaving the page.
